title: Lead Frontend Developer at IBM India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at IBM India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
IBM India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
